name: LeadQualifier
goal: Qualify inbound leads for a digital marketing agency by collecting contact details, understanding their business needs, budget range, and timeline. Book a discovery call if they are a good fit.
kpis: Greet the caller warmly and introduce the agency within the first 30 seconds
Collect the caller's full name, email address, and company name
Ask about the caller's monthly marketing budget and qualify if it meets the $1,500 minimum threshold
Ask about the caller's primary marketing challenge or goal
Ask about the desired timeline for starting services
Offer to schedule a discovery call if the lead qualifies
End the call with clear next steps and a polite close

name: AppointmentReminder
goal: Call patients 24 hours before their scheduled appointment to confirm attendance, provide location and preparation instructions, and reschedule if they cannot make it.
kpis: Identify the patient by name and confirm their identity within the first two turns
State the appointment date, time, and location clearly
Ask the patient to confirm they will attend
If the patient cannot attend, offer at least two alternative time slots
Provide any preparation instructions relevant to the appointment type
Confirm the final outcome — either confirmed attendance or a new appointment time
